title: Civil Engineer
description:
Overview

Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd is seeking an experienced Civil Engineer to support and manage building construction, addition & alteration (A&A), and infrastructure-related works across public-sector environments. The ideal candidate must possess hands-on experience working on NParks, Town Council, and HDB projects, with strong knowledge of Singapore construction standards, safety regulations, and authority submission processes.

Key Responsibilities

Project Management and Execution

  • Plan, coordinate, and supervise building construction and A&A works in accordance with project specifications, guidelines, and approved drawings.

  • Manage day-to-day site operations, including work scheduling, resource allocation, and subcontractor coordination.

  • Monitor project progress to ensure timely completion within budget and quality requirements.

Technical and Engineering Duties

  • Review structural and architectural drawings to ensure constructability and compliance with local codes.

  • Provide technical guidance and resolve site issues promptly through effective problem-solving and stakeholder communication.

  • Conduct site measurements, inspections, and quality checks to maintain adherence to project standards.

  • Prepare method statements, risk assessments, and technical submissions as required by authorities and clients.

Authority and Stakeholder Coordination

  • Liaise with NParks, Town Councils, HDB, BCA, PUB, LTA, and other authorities for inspections, approvals, and permit applications.

  • Coordinate with consultants, clients, and internal teams to ensure seamless project execution.

  • Prepare and submit progress reports, documentation, and compliance records.

Safety and Compliance

  • Ensure all works comply with WSH regulations, company safety policies, and authority requirements.

  • Support safety officers in implementing site safety measures and conducting toolbox meetings.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Civil Engineering or related discipline.

  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant Singapore experience in building construction, upgrading, repair, and maintenance works.

  • Proven experience managing NParks, Town Council, and HDB projects.

  • Strong knowledge of Singapore Codes of Practice, local authority procedures, and construction regulations.

  • Proficiency in reading and interpreting construction drawings and specifications.

  • Strong coordination, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

  • Able to work independently, handle multiple tasks, and manage deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

  • Familiarity with AutoCAD, MS Project, and other engineering-related software is an advantage.

Why Join Us

  • Opportunity to work on meaningful and high-impact public-sector projects.

  • Dynamic and collaborative engineering environment.

  • Professional growth and exposure to diverse infrastructure and building works.

postedCompany.description: Witflux Engineering Pte Ltd was set up in December 2011. From a humble start-up of 10 staff, the company has established itself as one of the market leaders through sheer hard work and perseverance. Today, the company has attained a credible grading for government & private contracts.
postedCompany.name: WITFLUX ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
